name: canvasight
description: A local canvas workspace that turns connected task nodes and attachments into structured Codex prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Build prompt flows on a local canvas
interface.longDescription: Canvasight opens a native Codex widget canvas for arranging task nodes, attachments, and flows, then sends generated Markdown to the current Codex thread through the widget host bridge with browser and await-based fallback for older sessions.
